cta.whatsappMessage: Hello! I would like to know more about Pamps events.

hero.headline: Your child's dream party starts here
hero.subheadline: Specialists in children's parties with complete, climate-controlled space and playground in Belo Horizonte. We also host adult and social events.
hero.imageAlt: Pamps Space - House & Event Space for children's parties

about.title: Children's Party Specialists
about.paragraph1: Pamps is an event space located at Av. Antônio Abrahão Caram, 420 - Belo Horizonte - MG, specialized in unforgettable children's parties. With fixed playground, recreation and complete structure, we create magical moments for children.
about.paragraph2: We also host adult events, social gatherings and corporate events. Our space features complete infrastructure, climate-controlled by dozens of units, enclosed environment, secure and recently renovated, with capacity for up to 120 people.

children.title: Children's Party
children.description: Our specialty! Complete space with fixed playground, recreation and full structure for an unforgettable party

adult.title: Social Events
adult.description: Climate-controlled and customizable structure for your event

corporate.description: Ideal for corporate and social events

themed.description: Full customization according to your needs

ctaSecondary.title: Ready for the dream party?
ctaSecondary.subtitle: Get in touch and discover how we can make your child's party unforgettable. We also host adult and social events.

packages.title: Our Packages
packages.subtitle: Choose the perfect package to make your party unforgettable

common.payment: Payment in up to 3 installments without interest
common.foodCustom: Food and drinks are defined according to the chosen package.
common.fullyCustomizable: Fully customizable package! Choose all items according to your needs.
common.andMore: ... and much more! Consult all available options.

festaLanche.sideBlurb: A weekday-friendly format: clear timing, defined menu and straightforward conditions.

items.fullBuffet: Full buffet (sweets, savory, fake cake and cutting)
items.duration3h30: Duration: 3 hours (with 30-minute grace period after the event)
items.guestsFestaLanche: Guests: 30 children (up to 12 years old) + 10 adults
items.bebidasLivre: Drinks: water, juice, and soda (unlimited quantity)
items.doces5: Sweets: 5 units per guest (flavor of choice)
items.card3x: Credit card in up to 3 interest-free installments

realeza.name: SNACK PARTY
realeza.notes: Special package for Monday to Thursday.

mundoMagico.name: Magic World
mundoMagico.notes: Consult thematic decoration, buffet and beverage options
mundoMagico.savings: Save up to R$ 300 with cash payment

hakunaMatata.name: Hakuna Matata
hakunaMatata.notes: Consult thematic decoration, buffet and beverage options

fendaBiquini.name: Bikini Bottom
fendaBiquini.notes: Aquatic theme available. Consult thematic decoration options

siriCascudo.name: Mr. Krabs
siriCascudo.notes: Ideal for marine themed parties. Consult options

aoInfinito.name: To Infinity and Beyond
aoInfinito.notes: Space theme available. Consult complete thematic decoration options
aoInfinito.savings: Save up to R$ 200 with cash payment

superPamps.name: Super Pamps
superPamps.notes: Unlimited draft beer for up to 80 people. Consult policy for additional guests, consumption and restrictions

euEscolhoVoce.name: I Choose You!
euEscolhoVoce.notes: Fully customizable package! Choose everything according to your needs: decoration, buffet, beverages, toys and much more. Let's create the party of your dreams together!

complete.title: Complete Party
complete.subtitle: Everything included for a complete experience

items.party4h: Party length: 4 hours (same as the budget proposal model)
items.guestCapacityBands: Reference table sizes: 50, 60, 80, 100 or 120 guests — 120 is the venue maximum
items.priceVariesByDay: Price varies by day: Monday–Thursday — Friday, Sunday & holidays — Saturday (premium)
items.freeUnder6: Kids up to 5 years and 11 months are free
items.earlyWelcome: 30 min early welcome (birthday child and parents)
items.familyFree: Free entry for parents, siblings and nanny
items.graduatesFree: Free entry for early education graduates

notes.decorationOptional: Also available: natural flowers and extra décor on request.
notes.winesOptional: Wines and sparkling wines from the optional list below, quoted separately.
notes.optionalsConsult: Availability, brands and pricing for these items—ask the Pamps team.
notes.pricingConsult: Final amounts, discounts and installments are confirmed in the official quote with the Pamps team.

conditions.default: Specific conditions may vary by date, availability and number of guests.
conditions.premiumDay: Saturday is a premium day with higher demand. Please check availability in advance.

payment.reserve30: 30% to book + remaining up to 10 days before
payment.card6x: Up to 6x interest-free on card (more installments on request)

calculator.title: Event Estimate Calculator
calculator.optionalIntro: Optional prices are indicative; brands, availability and final amounts with the Pamps team.

people.label: Number of guests
people.hintCompleta: Quote tiers only: 50, 60, 80, 100 or 120 guests (venue maximum).

party.label: Party type
party.phrase: This calculator shows indicative values only. Confirm your final quote via WhatsApp.

result.disclaimer: Estimate: Full Party uses table tiers only; Lunch Party follows fixed Package rules. Optionals are indicative—confirm everything with Pamps.

calculator.whatsappMessage: Hello, I used the website calculator. {party}, {people}, on {day}. Optionals: {optionals}. Estimated total: {total}.

events.subtitle: Complete and climate-controlled space for all types of events. From your child's dream party to corporate gatherings.

children.title: Children's Parties

babyShower.title: Baby Shower
babyShower.description: Celebrate the arrival of the new family member in a cozy and charming environment.

gathering.title: Gatherings
gathering.description: Company, friends, or family meetings in a versatile and comfortable space.

corporate.title: Corporate Events
corporate.description: Workshops, launches, and corporate events with all necessary infrastructure.

photoShoot.description: Perfect setting for family, maternity, and smash the cake photo shoots.

attractions.title: Attractions that make history
attractions.subtitle: Here are Pamps' most desired attractions to turn your party into a unique experience.

ledSlide.title: LED Slide
ledSlide.description: Can you imagine an LED slide at your party? Around here, fun is guaranteed... and the photos look amazing.

megaPlayground.title: MEGA Playground
megaPlayground.description: Have you ever thought about bringing a GIANT dream to life? That's exactly what we did. Multiple levels, tunnels, slides... pure adventure.

carousel.title: Other amazing attractions
carousel.subtitle: A photo corridor so you can explore other toys and fun spaces.

secondary.interactiveScenarios: Interactive Scenarios: Playhouse, Hospital, Market, and Pet Shop

space.title: Our Space
space.tourMessage: Explore our complete space without leaving home! Discover every detail of our climate-controlled environment, playground and all facilities.
